purpose: Improve the sparse evidence-gate registry page by binding the table rows to registered visual evidence thumbnails and an exposition-only reader-gate schematic.
claim_boundary: The AI-generated reader-gate slot is exposition only. Registered proxy, GRScenes VLM, material-effect, and InternNav thumbnails carry the evidence-bearing content.

ai_generated_slot.rationale: No visible local path, author name, watermark, or red material fallback. The slot is schematic and remains separated from evidence-bearing thumbnails.

standalone_figure.rationale: After visual iteration, boundary text is not clipped and the material thumbnail no longer exposes the prior ConvertAsset label crop.

related_visual_polish.rationale: The material-mechanism covered-bin tile now crops only the render region and no longer exposes the source figure's ConvertAsset column heading.

rendered_pdf_pages.rationale: The registry table, companion strip, and caption now occupy the former sparse table page without overlapping two-column text.
The explanatory overview text now fills both columns after moving the one-column claim-boundary example block below the prose.
The following claim-boundary examples page remains intact after the overview reflow; the material row no longer exposes the source figure's ConvertAsset column heading.

positive_patterns_present: not a new experiment, metric, VLM run, or navigation run
What This Supplement Does Not Prove
negative_patterns_absent: Red material in these diagnostic cases

commands: pdftotext -f 3 -l 5 paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf - | rg -n "Evidence-gate registry|AI-generated reader-gate schematic|not a new experiment, metric, VLM run, or navigation run|What This Supplement Does Not Prove"
if pdftotext paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf - | rg -n "Red material in these diagnostic cases|fig_vlm_grounding_cases|/cpfs/user|Zihou"; then exit 1; else echo negative-tokens-absent; fi
